sectionHeadings: 6. Amendment (2026-07-15): project-site base path + flavor-agnostic build
record.summary: An optional, off-by-default GitHub Pages workflow that stamped apps are born with: it publishes the built SPA (backend/web/dist) as a static preview site when the repo owner enables Pages. Absorption line item LI-3 of spec 010. Not a contract verb: it is CI-side, not factory-side. The workflow must be inert (skip cleanly, not fail) in repos where Pages is disabled, which is the default posture.
record.title: GitHub Pages deployment slot (LI-3)
